summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 29 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 79. This is above the 7-day average of 47 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 19 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 38 days past due with 29 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **24 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 26 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $52,105 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 16 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **24 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $13,594 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 4 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 4 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $28,604 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

147 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **93 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 26 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$46,807 in payments going out this week** across 34 tasks — make sure funds are available. $56,431 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 6. Keep the momentum going.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 14 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Down to 3 overdue — good. Close them out today. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
